result:
Created `agents/skills/watch-pr.md` — a single new file (108 lines) that codifies the ad-hoc PR monitoring pattern into a reusable skill.

**What it does:**
- Polls `gh pr checks` and `gh pr view` on interval (default 2min, timeout 30min)
- Auto-resolves review threads when the thread's file was modified after the review
- Dismisses stale bot reviews (only BOT-associated accounts, never humans)
- Reports merge-readiness when all checks pass + approved + threads resolved

**Commit:** `220f3d9` on `fix/rosary-110305`. All 531 tests pass.

tool_input.description: Check agents repo for skill examples
